paper_title: Genome-wide analysis of DNA polymorphisms, the methylome and transcriptome revealed that multiple factors are associated with low pollen fertility in autotetraploid rice

methods.description: Procedures used to verify DNA polymorphisms and gene expression levels in rice samples, including PCR amplification, sequencing, sequence alignment, RNA reverse transcription, and quantitative real-time PCR (qRT-PCR).

steps.description: All the primers used for PCR and qRT-PCR were developed by Primer 5.0 software, checked by NCBI Primer-BLAST, and are listed in S1 and S2 Tables.
steps.searchable_summary: Design PCR and qRT-PCR primers and check specificity using bioinformatics tools.
outputs: Primer sequences (listed in S1 and S2 Tables)

steps.description: PCR was used to amplify the polymorphic loci in a 20 μL volume containing 30 ng of DNA template, 0.15 μmol/L primer pairs, 1.0 μL of dNTPs (2.0 mmol/L each), 1 U of Taq polymerase, and 1× PCR buffer (50 mmol/L KCl, 10 mmol/L Tris-HCl [pH 8.3], 1.5 mmol/L MgCl2, 0.01% gluten). The PCR was done according to Liu et al. [12].
steps.searchable_summary: Perform PCR amplification of DNA polymorphic loci using specified reaction conditions.
inputs: 1× PCR buffer (50 mmol/L KCl, 10 mmol/L Tris-HCl [pH 8.3], 1.5 mmol/L MgCl2, 0.01% gluten)

steps.description: The PCR products were examined by agarose gel electrophoresis...
steps.searchable_summary: Analyze PCR products using agarose gel electrophoresis.
Perform Sanger sequencing on PCR products.

steps.description: The Sanger sequencing results were assembled by DNAMAN software...
steps.searchable_summary: Assemble raw Sanger sequencing data using specified software.

steps.description: ...and further aligned to the reference genome sequences to validate the variations in polymorphic loci using ClustalW software.
steps.searchable_summary: Align assembled sequences to reference genome and validate variations using alignment software.

steps.description: The total RNA obtained from rice anthers was reverse-transcribed using a PrimeScript™ RT reagent kit (Takara, Otsu, Shiga, Japan).
steps.searchable_summary: Convert total RNA to cDNA using a reverse transcription kit.

steps.description: Real-time PCR was performed using SsoAdvanced Universal SYBR Green Supermix (Bio-RAD, Hercules, CA, USA) for amplification of the PCR products. Real-time PCR conditions were conducted following the instructions of the manufacturer (Bio-RAD). Ubiquitin was used as an internal reference. All qRT-PCR amplifications were carried out in triplicate...
steps.searchable_summary: Perform quantitative real-time PCR (qRT-PCR) using specified reagents and conditions, including an internal reference, in triplicate.
outputs: Raw qRT-PCR data (Ct values) for target genes and internal reference (triplicate)

steps.description: The relative expression of genes was calculated by the 2 -ΔΔCT method [33].
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate relative gene expression using the delta-delta Ct method.
inputs: Raw qRT-PCR data (Ct values) for target genes and internal reference

steps.description: ...and the results are presented as the means ± standard deviations.
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate and report mean and standard deviation for relative gene expression results from triplicate experiments.
inputs: Relative gene expression values from triplicate experiments
outputs: Mean and standard deviation of relative expression
